title: ziziphora rotundifolia
intro: Ziziphora rotundifolia, also known as Purple Dragon or Korean Mint, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and China. It is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ziziphora rotundifolia include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in traditional medicine and as a culinary ingredient.
